name: Event Photo Slideshows
description: Turn event photos from Google Drive into TikTok and Instagram slideshows. Select a folder, the pipeline assembles a slideshow, generates a caption, and schedules it. Perfect for music events, community gatherings, or any recurring real-world events.
requiredTools: gws CLI (Google Workspace — for Drive access)

crons.name: schedule-day
crons.description: Schedule queued slideshows for today via Dropspace (after you've added slideshows to the queue)

setupSteps: Get a Dropspace API key at https://dropspace.dev → Settings → API Keys
Set up Google Workspace credentials for Drive access (see SETUP.md in this template)
Create a Google Drive folder for your event photos and copy the folder ID
Edit app.json — replace YOUR_GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID with your actual folder IDs
Edit CONTEXT.md — fill in your event name, venue, and community details
Run the slideshow generator: node ~/markus/private/clipper/scripts/create-slideshows.js --app YOUR_APP
Review and approve the generated slideshows
Set up schedule-day cron to auto-schedule approved slideshows each morning
notes: Photos are pulled directly from Google Drive — no manual download needed
The pipeline selects the best photos automatically (configurable in app.json)
TikTok auto-adds music by default for better reach
photosPerSlideshow defaults to 8 — adjust in app.json based on your event
See ~/markus/private/clipper/ for the full slideshow documentation
